Article.ArticleTitle: Acute effects of foam rolling vs. passive rest following a single bout of complex contrast training.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: The authors declare no conflict of interest. Ethical approval: The Ethics Committee of the Bursa Uludağ University provided ethical approval for the study (Date: 16/01/2023; No: 2023–1/41; ID: 2011-KAEK-26/45).
